remote_integrations.evidence: .github/workflows contains no active YAML workflows; templates are preserved under deployment/github-actions-disabled.

remote_integrations.reason: The repo deployment authority is Cloudflare Pages/direct upload, but GitHub receives a Workers service check named xlooop. The observed Workers Builds triggers had no build command and were using Worker deploy commands against a Pages/static bundle configuration.
remote_integrations.required_resolution: Disable the stale Workers GitHub integration, or rewire both trigger UUIDs to run npm run build followed by wrangler pages deploy to dist-cloudflare. Do not add a Worker main entry point just to satisfy the stale Workers trigger.

operator_rules: Do not claim public/self-serve readiness from a red remote Workers check.
Do not weaken local deployment gates to compensate for a stale external integration.
Do not send a test link to an external customer until Access, tenant entitlement, customer-safe export, and owner decision evidence are present.
